_note: Stryker mutation testing baseline for src/engine/pipeline/. Could not be captured under the sandboxed migration session — Stryker worker IPC requires localhost socket binds that the greywall network sandbox blocks (EPERM AggregateError on internalConnectMultiple). The baseline must be regenerated outside the sandbox before Phase 8 (Cleanup) compares the post-migration mutation score on src/engine/{flows,atoms,composites,adapters}/ against this number.

stryker_runtime_error.fatal_log_excerpt: Unexpected error occurred while running Stryker StrykerError: AggregateError: EPERM (undefined) AggregateError [EPERM] at internalConnectMultiple (node:net:1193:18)

regeneration_command:
STRYKER_CONFIG=$(mktemp -t stryker-baseline.XXXXXX.mjs) && cat > "$STRYKER_CONFIG" <<'EOF'
export default {
  packageManager: 'npm',
  testRunner: 'vitest',
  plugins: ['@stryker-mutator/vitest-runner'],
  reporters: ['clear-text', 'json'],
  jsonReporter: { fileName: '.check/mutation.pipeline-baseline.json' },
  mutate: [
    'src/engine/pipeline/**/*.ts',
    '!src/engine/pipeline/**/__tests__/**',
    '!src/engine/pipeline/**/*.test.ts',
    '!src/engine/pipeline/**/*.d.ts',
  ],
  coverageAnalysis: 'perTest',
  incremental: false,
  thresholds: { high: 80, low: 60, break: 0 },
  tempDirName: '.stryker-tmp-baseline',
  cleanTempDir: true,
}
EOF
npx stryker run "$STRYKER_CONFIG"
_phase8_assertion: Phase 8 must compare the recorded score (when populated) against the post-migration mutation score on src/engine/{flows,atoms,composites,adapters}/**/*.ts. The post-migration score must be >= the score captured here.
